my_files: src/PIL/ImageOps.py,Tests/test_imageops.py
note: Finished strip_metadata. In exif_transpose() I: (1) added 'strip_metadata: bool = False' as the last keyword-only param on both @overload signatures and the impl signature (after in_place); (2) at the end of the 'if method is not None:' branch, after the existing orientation-tag cleanup, added 'if strip_metadata: exif.clear(); exif_image.info = {}'; (3) replaced the old 'elif not in_place: return image.copy()' tail with an 'else:' block that computes exif_image (image if in_place, else a copy) and applies the same strip_metadata clearing when there's no orientation tag to transpose. Only appended two new test functions (test_exif_transpose_strip_metadata, test_exif_transpose_strip_metadata_in_place) after test_exif_transpose_in_place - did not touch any existing lines. Safe for you to add transform_callback as the next last param now.
